Mixed Flow Fan

Ventilation

Circular Inline Fan

Compact circular inline duct fans suited for kitchen, bathroom and office extract and supply air applications.

Air Purification

Electrostatic Air Cleaner

KET Series electrostatic precipitator — 95–99% efficiency on grease, smoke and fine particles down to 0.1 micron.

View Details
Electrical

Electrical Panels

AHU starter panels, LT panels, basement ventilation panels and CPM panels — precision-built for safe power control.
